cards.name: Captain
cards.desc: The head of every Nanotrasen space station who spends most of their shift delegating and protecting the disk.
cards.effect: Must be Special Summoned by using a Command faction card along with a card of a different faction. Once per turn, choose a Unit you control. It gains 200 ATK for each different faction you control until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Renault
cards.desc: The Captain's trusty pet fox who spends most shifts walking around aimlessly in the Captain's Office.

cards.name: Nanotrasen Representative
cards.desc: Hired as an advisory for station's command members, Nanotrasen Representatives ensure Standard Operating Procedure is followed.
cards.effect: While this card is face-up, each Command Unit you control gains 300 ATK.

cards.name: Blueshield
cards.desc: Hailing from a specialized training branch, Blueshields are hired to protect and ensure the safety of the Captain and other Heads of Staff.
cards.effect: If one of your Command Units are attacked by your opponent, you may Special Summon this card in Defense Position.

cards.name: Strongly Worded Fax
cards.desc: Sometimes you just gotta report things to your higher-ups.

cards.name: Command Headset
cards.desc: A headset with the ability to hear the illustrious Command channel.
cards.effect: Once during your turn, you may look at the top card of your deck. If it is a Command Unit, add it to your hand. If not, place it back on the top of your deck.

cards.name: Nuclear Authentication Disk
cards.desc: A highly sought out disk containing unique cryptographic data, the Nuclear Authentication Disk is used to detonate nuclear fission devices.
cards.effect: While this card is on the field and you control a Command Unit, your opponent may not Special Summon a Unit that is Level 6 or higher. If this card is destroyed, your opponent draws 2 cards.

cards.name: ERT Call
cards.desc: When on-station personnel are not able to handle the happenings of the station, Central Command may elect to send some extra hands.

cards.name: Head of Staff Meeting
cards.desc: I'm really sure the Captain has something REALLY important to tell us when they interrupt our work.
cards.effect: Search your deck for at most a Command Unit, Special Summon it, and then shuffle your deck.
